name: Duo Accounts Never Used (90 days)
description: Detects active Duo accounts older than 90 days that have never logged in.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM duo_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND u.last_login_at IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
remediation: Remove or disable never-used accounts and fix any over-provisioning in onboarding workflows.
